email.subject: JAVA_3year_Pune
email.body:
Hi Anuvarshini,

I came across your LinkedIn post regarding the opening for the Java Developer role at Cintal and found the opportunity closely aligned with my skills and experience.

I have 3+ years of hands-on experience in Java Full Stack Application Development, working with technologies such as Java, Spring Boot, MIcroservices,REST APIs, AWS, SQL, and frontend frameworks.

Please find my resume attached for your reference. I would appreciate the opportunity to discuss how my experience can contribute to your team.

Current CTC: 7Lpa
Expected CTC: 13-15Lpa
Notice Period: 30 Days
Location: Pune

Looking forward to hearing from you.

Thanks & Regards,
Aryan Jaiswal

KPIT is Hiring | Transmission Application Software Engineer | MATLAB/Simulink | MBD | AUTOSAR ... Interested candidates can share their updated resume ...
#kpit #hiring #autosar #transmissiondomain #matlab #simulink #modelbaseddevelopment #mbd #embeddedsoftware #automotivesoftware #automotiveengineering #misra #maab #aspice #softwareengineer… | Aniket Thorwade Agree & Join LinkedIn By clicking Continue to join or sign in, you agree to LinkedIn’s User Agreement , Privacy Policy , and Cookie Policy . Skip to main content LinkedIn Top Content People Learning Jobs Games Get the app Sign in Join now Aniket Thorwade’s Post Aniket Thorwade 23h Report this post 🚀 KPIT is Hiring | Transmission Application Software Engineer | MATLAB/Simulink | MBD | AUTOSAR 🚀 Are you passionate about building next-generation automotive software solutions? KPIT is looking for experienced professionals in the Transmission Domain to join our growing team. 📌 Position: Transmission Application Software Engineer Experience: 4–9 Years. Role Overview We are seeking a skilled Model-Based Software Engineer with expertise in the Transmission domain to develop high-quality automotive software solutions using MATLAB/Simulink and model-based design practices. The candidate will be responsible for requirement definition, architecture design, software development, and verification activities aligned with automotive standards such as MISRA, MAAB, ASPICE, and OEM guidelines. Key Responsibilities ✅ Create and manage software requirements using PTC Integrity / Windchill RV&S ✅ Develop static and dynamic system architecture using Enterprise Architect (Sparx EA) ✅ Create Software Detailed Design Documents (SWDD) ✅ Develop and optimize control algorithms using MATLAB/Simulink & Stateflow ✅ Ensure compliance with MAAB modeling guidelines ✅ Perform automatic code generation using Embedded Coder ✅ Ensure MISRA C compliance through static code analysis ✅ Design and execute MIL/SIL test cases and unit testing activities ✅ Perform validation, verification, and coverage analysis ✅ Work within an ASPICE-compliant software development environment Required Skills 🔹 Strong experience in Transmission Domain 🔹 Hands-on experience in AUTOSAR development 🔹 MATLAB/Simulink & Model-Based Development (MBD) 🔹 PTC Integrity / Windchill RV&S 🔹 Enterprise Architect (EA) 🔹 MISRA C, MAAB Compliance, Polyspace 🔹 MIL/SIL Testing, Simulink Test & Coverage 🔹 Requirement Engineering & Traceability 🔹 Git/SVN Configuration Management 🔹 Strong understanding of ASPICE Educational Qualification 🎓 Bachelor's or master's degree in Electronics, Electrical, Mechanical, Automotive Engineering, or related disciplines. 📩 Interested candidates can share their updated resume along with the following details to anikett2@kpit.com Current CTC Expected CTC (ECTC) Notice Period Current Location Availability for Interview Feel free to connect with me directly for more details. #KPIT #Hiring #AUTOSAR #TransmissionDomain #MATLAB #Simulink #ModelBasedDevelopment email_ai.subject: Application for Software Engineer at Kpit
email_ai.body:
Hi there,

I came across your LinkedIn post regarding the opening for the Software Engineer role at Kpit and found the opportunity closely aligned with my skills and experience.

I have 3+ years of hands-on experience in Java Full Stack Application Development, working with technologies such as Java, Spring Boot,MicroServices, REST APIs,AWS,Databases like Mysql and Postgresql, Git and frontend frameworks.

Please find my resume attached for your reference. I would appreciate the opportunity to discuss how my experience can contribute to your team.

Looking forward to hearing from you.

Thanks & Regards,
Aryan Jaiswal
